endpoints.name: Get account users data by account ID
endpoints.description: Get account users data by account ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VONAGE_API_KEY}} with your VONAGE API KEY. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.

endpoints.name: Get user data by account ID and user ID
endpoints.description: Get user data by account ID and user ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VONAGE_API_KEY}} with your VONAGE API KEY. Replace {{USER_ID}} with a real user_id. Replace {{ACCOUNT_ID}} with a real account_id.
